description:
About the Role
Marketsense is seeking a talented
Full Stack Developer
to build and maintain scalable web applications. You will be responsible for both front-end and back-end development, ensuring seamless user experiences and robust system performance.
Develop, test, and maintain web applications across both front-end and back-end environments
Design and implement responsive, user-friendly interfaces using modern frameworks and technologies
Develop and manage APIs, as well as design and optimize database structures
Ensure application performance, security, and scalability through best practices and continuous optimization
Collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and cross-functional engineering teams to deliver high-quality solutions
Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues while continuously improving system performance and reliability
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
2–5 years of full stack development experience
Excellent written and verbal communication abilities; proficiency in Chinese is an added advantage.
Proficiency in JavaScript (React, Angular, or Vue)
Strong backend experience (Node.js, Python, Java, or similar)
Experience with databases (SQL/NoSQL), DevOps, CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with REST APIs and microservices architectures
Knowledge of cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP)
